# BTCFi API — Agent Discovery File
# https://btcfi.aiindigo.com
# Bitcoin data, BTCFi intelligence, ZK proofs & real-time streams for AI agents

## Overview
BTCFi API is an agent-native Bitcoin intelligence platform providing 33 endpoints
across Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana blockchains. All paid endpoints use x402
micropayments in USDC (no API keys, no subscriptions). Several endpoints are free.

Base URL: https://btcfi.aiindigo.com
OpenAPI: https://btcfi.aiindigo.com/openapi.json
MCP Server: npx @aiindigo/btcfi-mcp (27 tools, stdio transport)
SDK: npm install @aiindigo/btcfi (28 methods)

## Authentication
- x402 micropayment: X-Payment header with USDC payment proof
- Wallet signing: X-Signature + X-Nonce + X-Signer + X-Timestamp headers
- Free endpoints: No authentication required
- Internal services: X-Internal-Key header (pre-shared)

## Payment Networks
- Base (EVM L2): Coinbase facilitator, zero fees, ERC-3009
- Solana: NLx402 (PCEF nonprofit), zero fees

## Pricing (USDC per query)
- $0.01: Core queries (fees, mempool, address, UTXOs, tx, blocks, streams)
- $0.02: Intelligence (whale alerts, risk scoring, fee prediction, network health)
- $0.02: Security (YARA-pattern threat analysis)
- $0.02: Solv Protocol (reserves, yield, liquidity, risk)
- $0.03: ZK proof generation (balance, age, membership)
- $0.05: Transaction broadcast (write operation)
- Free: Health check, staking status, API index, dashboard

## Free Endpoints (No Payment Required)
- GET /api/health — System health check
- GET /api/v1 — API index with all endpoint listings
- GET /api/v1/staking/status — Staking tier and rate limit status
- GET /api/v1/webhooks — List webhooks (X-API-Key required)
- POST /api/v1/webhooks — Register webhook (X-API-Key required)
- DELETE /api/v1/webhooks?id={id} — Remove webhook (X-API-Key required)
- POST /api/v1/webhooks/test — Test fire webhook (X-API-Key required)
- POST /api/v1/webhooks/evaluate — Evaluate triggers (X-API-Key required)
- GET /.well-known/x402-manifest.json — Payment manifest
- GET /.well-known/peac.txt — Usage terms and receipts

## Core Bitcoin Endpoints ($0.01)
- GET /api/v1/fees — Fee estimates (fastest, 30min, 1hr, economy) with USD values
- GET /api/v1/mempool — Mempool summary, tx count, size, fee histogram
- GET /api/v1/address/{addr} — Address balance, tx count, funded/spent stats
- GET /api/v1/address/{addr}/utxos — Unspent transaction outputs
- GET /api/v1/address/{addr}/txs — Transaction history
- GET /api/v1/tx/{txid} — Full transaction details
- GET /api/v1/tx/{txid}/status — Confirmation status
- POST /api/v1/tx/broadcast — Broadcast signed transaction ($0.05)
- GET /api/v1/block/latest — Latest blocks with details
- GET /api/v1/block/{id} — Block by height or hash

## Intelligence Endpoints ($0.02)
- GET /api/v1/intelligence/fees — AI fee prediction (1h, 6h, 24h windows)
- GET /api/v1/intelligence/whales — Large transaction detection
- GET /api/v1/intelligence/risk/{addr} — Address risk scoring
- GET /api/v1/intelligence/network — Hashrate, difficulty, congestion
- GET /api/v1/intelligence/consolidate/{addr} — UTXO consolidation advice
- GET /api/v1/intelligence/mvrv — MVRV ratio
- GET /api/v1/intelligence/sopr — SOPR (Spent Output Profit Ratio)
- GET /api/v1/intelligence/nupl — NUPL (Net Unrealized Profit/Loss)
- GET /api/v1/intelligence/hodl-waves — HODL wave distribution

## Security Endpoints ($0.02)
- GET /api/v1/security/threat/{addr} — YARA-pattern threat analysis (8 patterns)

## Solv Protocol / BTCFi Endpoints ($0.02)
- GET /api/v1/solv/reserves — SolvBTC supply, backing ratio, TVL
- GET /api/v1/solv/yield — xSolvBTC APY, yield strategies
- GET /api/v1/solv/liquidity — Cross-chain SolvBTC distribution
- GET /api/v1/solv/risk — Multi-factor risk assessment

## ZK Proof Endpoints
- POST /api/v1/zk/balance-proof — Prove balance >= threshold ($0.03)
- POST /api/v1/zk/age-proof — Prove UTXO age >= N blocks ($0.03)
- POST /api/v1/zk/membership — Prove set membership ($0.03)
- POST /api/v1/zk/verify — Verify any ZK proof ($0.01)

## Real-Time Streams ($0.01)
- GET /api/v1/stream — SSE: new blocks, fee changes, mempool surges
- GET /api/v1/stream/whales — SSE: whale transaction alerts (?min=100 BTC)

## Cross-Chain Endpoints
### Ethereum ($0.01)
- GET /api/v1/eth/gas — ETH gas prices
- GET /api/v1/eth/address/{addr} — ETH address balance
- GET /api/v1/eth/tx/{hash} — ETH transaction details

### Solana ($0.01)
- GET /api/v1/sol/fees — SOL priority fees
- GET /api/v1/sol/address/{addr} — SOL address balance

## Webhooks / Push Notifications (Free, requires X-API-Key)
- GET /api/v1/webhooks — List your registered webhooks
- POST /api/v1/webhooks — Register webhook (body: url, triggers[], secret)
- DELETE /api/v1/webhooks?id={id} — Remove a webhook
- POST /api/v1/webhooks/test — Fire test payload (body: event?, webhook_id?)
- POST /api/v1/webhooks/evaluate — Evaluate triggers against current conditions

### Trigger Types
- whale: fires when tx >= threshold (default 10 BTC)
- price_above: fires when BTC price crosses above threshold
- price_below: fires when BTC price crosses below threshold
- fee_spike: fires when fee rate > 2x 24h average
- block_mined: fires on every new block

### Webhook Payload
JSON POST with HMAC-SHA256 signature:
```
{
  "event": "whale",
  "timestamp": "2026-06-17T...",
  "data": { "txid": "...", "amount_btc": "...", "amount_usd": "...", "signal": "..." },
  "webhook_id": "wh_...",
  "signature": "hmac-sha256-hex"
}
```
Verify signature using your webhook secret with HMAC-SHA256.

### Headers
- X-Webhook-ID: webhook identifier
- X-Webhook-Signature: HMAC-SHA256 signature
- X-Webhook-Event: trigger type
- X-Webhook-Delivery: unique delivery ID

## Agent Integration
- MCP: Use npx @aiindigo/btcfi-mcp for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini integration
- SDK: Use BTCFi class from @aiindigo/btcfi for programmatic access
- Telegram: @BTC_Fi_Bot for free human access (15 commands + inline mode)
- Chrome Extension: Price badge, whale alerts, address inspector

## Security Features
- Wallet-based request signing (Ed25519 + secp256k1)
- Encrypted responses (Curve25519 + XSalsa20-Poly1305)
- Zero-knowledge proofs (Groth16)
- 8 YARA-style threat detection patterns
- Nonce replay protection
- PEAC Protocol cryptographic receipts
- Tiered rate limiting (free: 100/min, signed: 500/min, paid: unlimited)

## Contact
- Website: https://btcfi.aiindigo.com
- Security: security@aiindigo.com
- Operator: AI Indigo (https://aiindigo.com)
- GitHub: https://github.com/aiindigo925/btcfi-api
